headline: CBRE vs. Newmark: Which Real Estate Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
summary: One firm boasts global scale and Fortune 100 clients, while the other delivers higher growth and leaner operations. Key financials and risks set them apart.

raw.headline: CBRE vs. Newmark: Which Real Estate Stock Is a Better Buy in 2026?
raw.summary: One firm boasts global scale and Fortune 100 clients, while the other delivers higher growth and leaner operations. Key financials and risks set them apart.

headline: Can CBRE (CBRE) Climb 36.69% to Reach the Level Wall Street Analysts Expect?
summary: The mean of analysts' price targets for CBRE (CBRE) points to a 36.7% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.
